author: lOrm
content: Landed src/tools/task_stop.rs. Added BackgroundAgent::cancel_requested (AtomicBool) and BackgroundAgentManager::request_cancel which sets the cooperative flag AND records a cancellation failure so subsequent agent_output/task_output polls return immediately rather than spinning. 4 tests pin: missing arg / unknown agent / fresh cancel flips both flags + records error / idempotent second stop. Registered in tools::registry as 'task_stop'. Note: cooperative cancellation only — the runner loop is expected to observe the flag between turns.
